sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_lines (id UInt32, line Geometry) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_lines (id, line) VALUES (1, readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (1 1, 2 2, 3 3)'));
UPDATE geo_lines SET line = readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (0 0, 1 1, 2 2)') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, line FROM geo_lines WHERE line = readWKTLineString('LINESTRING (1 1, 2 2)');
SELECT count() FROM geo_lines WHERE line IS NOT NULL;
